html:
The Opulent Pickaxe is a variant of the normal Pickaxe that has four times as much durability and requires Gold instead of Flint, allowing Flint to be saved for other uses. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 4 Twigs to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Opulent Pickaxe has 132 uses, 4 times as many as the normal Pickaxe. It has the same mining efficiency (6 hits per boulder) and damage (27.2 damage per strike) as the normal Pickaxe.

Contents

  • 1 Usage
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Usage

To mine an object with the Pickaxe, right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click on the object. Once the character begins to mine, hold down the LMB or Spacebar to keep mining until the object breaks. Alternatively, one can mine faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing.

×2

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Ornate Nordic Pickaxe skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Opulent Pickaxe
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of an expensive pickaxe.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Ornate Nordic Pickaxe
A resplendent golden pickaxe, its design reminiscent of days of yore.
See ingame

Trivia

  • The Opulent Pickaxe was added in the October 2nd, 2012 update.
  • When the Opulent Pickaxe is equipped, a 'ding' sound can be heard.
  • In reality, gold is not a practical metal to be used in tools or weapons as it is a soft metal; it would easily deform and break. This is often remarked when examined by some Characters.
    • Maxwell breaks the fourth wall upon examining the Opulent Pickaxe when he states, "This must be game logic".
    • Despite gold's softness, low-purity gold would still be rather tough; almost certainly tougher than flint. Gold would also be repairable, whereas flint would have to be replaced.


Gallery

  • Original HD Opulent Pickaxe icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“Hey, isn't gold really soft?”
–Wilson
“It won't light rocks on fire, but at least it's shiny.”
–Willow
“Fancy pickaxe do better smash.”

“At least I can smash rocks with style.”
–Wendy

–WX-78
“The most malleable of metals, but let's see how this mines.”
–Wickerbottom

–Woodie

–Maxwell
“Göld för göld.”
–Wigfrid
“The finest pickaxe of them all.”
–Webber
“That looks nice.”
–Warly

–Wormwood

–Winona

–Wortox
“It stronger than normal rock cracker.”
–Wurt
“It makes sense if you don't think about it.”
–Walter
“Just don't think about it and it'll make sense.”
–Wanda
The Opulent Pickaxe is a variant of the normal Pickaxe that has four times as much durability and requires Gold instead of Flint, allowing Flint to be saved for other uses. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 4 Twigs to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Opulent Pickaxe has 132 uses, 4 times as many as the normal Pickaxe. It has the same mining efficiency (6 hits per boulder) and damage (27.2 damage per strike) as the normal Pickaxe.

Usage[edit | edit source]
To mine an object with the Pickaxe, right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click on the object. Once the character begins to mine, hold down the LMB or Spacebar to keep mining until the object breaks. Alternatively, one can mine faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing.
×2

The Woven - Elegant Ornate Nordic Pickaxe skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Opulent Pickaxe was added in the October 2nd, 2012 update.
When the Opulent Pickaxe is equipped, a 'ding' sound can be heard.
In reality, gold is not a practical metal to be used in tools or weapons as it is a soft metal; it would easily deform and break. This is often remarked when examined by some Characters.
Maxwell breaks the fourth wall upon examining the Opulent Pickaxe when he states, "This must be game logic".
Despite gold's softness, low-purity gold would still be rather tough; almost certainly tougher than flint. Gold would also be repairable, whereas flint would have to be replaced.

Original HD Opulent Pickaxe icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cuốc sang trọng là một biến thể của Cuốc thông thường có độ bền gấp bốn lần và cần Vàng thay vì Đá lửa, cho phép tiết kiệm Đá lửa cho các mục đích sử dụng khác. Nó cần 2 Vàng Thỏi và 4 Cành Cây để chế tạo và cần Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Cuốc Sang Trọng có 132 công dụng, gấp 4 lần Cuốc bình thường. Nó có hiệu quả khai thác tương tự (6 lần đánh mỗi tảng đá) và sát thương (27,2 sát thương mỗi lần đánh) như Pickaxe thông thường.
